class.name: AudioStreamRandomizer
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s to be played at random volume and pitch.
class.description: [AudioStreamRandomizer] can hold one or more audio streams in a pool. When an audio stream player plays an [AudioStreamRandomizer] resource, it picks an audio stream from the pool following [enum PlaybackMode] and each stream's probability weight, and applies random volume and pitch shifting. This stream is ideal to make sound effects that play multiple times in a short period of time sound more natural, by subtly randomizing their volume and pitch each time they are played, or by picking similar sounds from a pool. It is recommended to use [AudioStreamWAV] for sound effects.

method.name: add_stream
method.description: Inserts the [param stream] at the specified [param index]. If the index is less than zero, the insertion occurs at the end of the underlying pool. [param weight] controls how likely the stream can be played, compared to other streams. This is only relevant if [member playback_mode] is random.

method.name: get_stream
method.description: Returns the [AudioStream] of the given [param index].

method.name: get_stream_probability_weight
method.description: Returns the probability weight associated with the stream of the given [param index].

method.name: move_stream
method.description: Moves the stream from one index to another.

method.name: remove_stream
method.description: Removes the stream of the given [param index].

method.name: set_stream
method.description: Sets the [param stream] of the given [param index].

method.name: set_stream_probability_weight
method.description: Sets the probability [param weight] of the stream of the given [param index]. The higher this value, the more likely that the randomizer will choose the stream if [member playback_mode] is random.

members.member: Controls how [AudioStreamRandomizer] picks which stream to play next.

The largest possible frequency multiplier of the random pitch variation. Pitch will be randomly chosen within a range of [code skip-lint]1.0 / random_pitch[/code] and [code skip-lint]random_pitch[/code]. A value of [code]1.0[/code] means no variation. A value of [code]2.0[/code] means pitch will be randomized between double and half. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property also sets [member random_pitch_semitones].
The largest possible distance, in semitones, of the random pitch variation. A value of [code]0.0[/code] means no variation. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property also sets [member random_pitch].

The intensity of random volume variation, in decibels. Volume will be increased or decreased by a random value up to [code skip-lint]random_volume_offset_db[/code]. A value of [code]0.0[/code] means no variation. A value of [code]3.0[/code] means volume will be randomized between [code]-3.0 dB[/code] and [code]+3.0 dB[/code].
The [AudioStream] at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. streams_count - 1[/code] range.
The probability weight of the [AudioStream] at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. streams_count - 1[/code] range.
The number of streams in the stream pool.

constants.constant: Picks a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream, but avoid playing the same stream twice in a row whenever possible. If only 1 stream is present in the pool, the same stream will always play, effectively allowing repeats to occur.
Picks a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream. If only 1 stream is present in the pool, the same stream will always play.
Plays streams in the order they appear in the stream pool. If only 1 stream is present in the pool, the same stream will always play.
